title: SummaryHook
description: Report produced by `hook-summarizer` for a single `hook` node. Extends `report-base.schema.json`. Stability: experimental.

whatItDoes.description: One-sentence summary of what the hook does when triggered. REQUIRED.

triggerInferred.description: Event or condition the summarizer inferred from the body. MAY differ from declared `frontmatter.event`/`condition`; rules can emit drift issues.

blockingInferred.description: Whether execution appears to block host flow. Compare against declared `frontmatter.blocking`.

idempotentInferred.description: Whether the hook appears safe to run multiple times. Compare against declared `frontmatter.idempotent`.
